name: Mac and Cheese
tagline: Stovetop mac with béchamel base, three cheeses, golden crumb

hero.alt: Mac and cheese with golden breadcrumb top
hero.caption: mac and cheese — three-cheese béchamel

steps.title: Boil pasta al dente
steps.detail: Boil pasta in salted water 2 minutes less than package time. Drain.
steps.tip: Underdone pasta absorbs more sauce. Overdone goes to mush.

steps.title: Build the béchamel
steps.detail: Melt butter in a wide pot. Whisk in flour; cook 90 seconds. Slowly whisk in milk; bring to a simmer until it coats the back of a spoon.
steps.tip: If lumpy, blast 30 seconds with an immersion blender — fixes it instantly.

steps.title: Stir in cheese
steps.detail: Off heat, add cheddar, gruyère, half the parmesan, mustard powder, salt, pepper. Whisk until smooth. Stir in pasta.
steps.tip: Adding cheese off heat keeps it from breaking into oily clumps.

steps.title: Crumb top and bake
steps.detail: Pour into baking dish. Top with panko mixed with remaining parmesan and a bit of melted butter. Bake 400°F for 15 minutes until bubbly and golden.
steps.tip: Skip the bake for stovetop mac — equally good if you're in a hurry.

healthFacts: Béchamel-based mac (vs. Velveeta) lets you control sodium with the cheese choice.
Mixing cheeses (cheddar + gruyère + parmesan) gives meltability + flavor depth.
